sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n49211" key="qru/allon" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θρύαλλον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n49211.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">shower of smuts</tr_> from a distant bonfire, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:345:22" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">345.22</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
